intro idx1 idx2 h
          have lem : ∀ {α} (l : List α) (i : Fin l.length), l.Perm (l[i] :: l.eraseIdx i) := by
            intro α l i; induction l with
            | nil => exact i.elim0
            | cons x xs ih =>
              match i with
              | ⟨0, _⟩ => exact List.Perm.refl _
              | ⟨i+1, hi⟩ =>
                simp
                exact (List.Perm.cons x (ih ⟨i, hi⟩)).trans (List.Perm.swap x xs[i] _)
          match idx1, idx2 with
          | ⟨0, _⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ => simp; exact l1
          | ⟨0, _⟩, ⟨j+1, hj⟩ =>
            simp at h ⊢
            subst x
            exact l1.trans (lem _ ⟨j, hj⟩)
          | ⟨i+1, hi⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ =>
            simp at h ⊢
            subst x
            exact (lem _ ⟨i, hi⟩).symm.trans l1
          | ⟨i+1, hi⟩, ⟨j+1, hj⟩ =>
            simp at h ⊢
            exact List.Perm.cons x (l2 h)

             simp [List.eraseIdx_cons_succ] at heq ⊢
             exact (IH heq).cons x
        | swap x y l =>
          intro idx1 idx2 heq
          have p1 := perm_cons_eraseIdx (y::x::l) idx1
          have p2 := perm_cons_eraseIdx (x::y::l) idx2
          rw [heq] at p1
          apply List.Perm.cons_inv
          exact p1.symm.trans ((List.Perm.swap x y l).trans p2)
        | trans l1 l2 l3 h1 h2 IH1 IH2 =>
          intro idx1 idx3 heq
          have : l1[idx1] ∈ l2 := h1.subset (List.getElem_mem l1 idx1.1 idx1.2)
          obtain ⟨idx2, hidx2⟩ := in_list_idx this
          exact (IH1 hidx2.symm).trans (IH2 (hidx2.trans heq))

        | swap x y l =>
          intro idx1 idx2 heq
          have perm_cons_eraseIdx : ∀ (l : List α) (i : Fin l.length), l.Perm (l[i] :: l.eraseIdx i) := by
             intro l i
             induction l generalizing i with
             | nil => exact i.elim0
             | cons x xs ih =>
               match i with
               | ⟨0, _⟩ => simp; apply List.Perm.refl

          simp only [List.length_cons] at idx1 idx2
          match idx1, idx2 with
          | ⟨0, _⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ => simp [List.eraseIdx_cons_zero]; apply List.Perm.refl
          | ⟨1, _⟩, ⟨1, _⟩ => simp [List.eraseIdx_cons_succ, List.eraseIdx_cons_zero]; apply List.Perm.refl

          | ⟨1, _⟩, ⟨k+2, hk⟩ =>
             simp at heq; simp [List.eraseIdx_cons_succ, List.eraseIdx_cons_zero]
             apply (List.Perm.swap _ _ _).trans; apply List.Perm.cons
             exact (perm_cons_eraseIdx l ⟨k, by simp at hk; simpa using hk⟩).trans (by simp [heq])
          | ⟨k+2, hk⟩, ⟨1, _⟩ =>
             simp at heq; simp [List.eraseIdx_cons_succ, List.eraseIdx_cons_zero]
             apply (List.Perm.swap _ _ _).trans; apply List.Perm.cons
             exact (perm_cons_eraseIdx l ⟨k, by simp at hk; simpa using hk⟩).trans (by simp [heq]) |>.symm
          | ⟨k+2, hk⟩, ⟨m+2, hm⟩ =>
             simp at heq; simp [List.eraseIdx_cons_succ]
             apply (List.Perm.swap _ _ _).trans; apply List.Perm.swap
             apply List.Perm.cons; apply List.Perm.cons
             have : l.Perm (l[k] :: l.eraseIdx k) := perm_cons_eraseIdx l ⟨k, by simp at hk; simpa using hk⟩
             have : l.Perm (l[m] :: l.eraseIdx m) := perm_cons_eraseIdx l ⟨m, by simp at hm; simpa using hm⟩
             have p : l[k] :: l.eraseIdx k ~ l[m] :: l.eraseIdx m := (perm_cons_eraseIdx l ⟨k, by simp at hk; simpa using hk⟩).symm.trans (perm_cons_eraseIdx l ⟨m, by simp at hm; simpa using hm⟩)
             simp [heq] at p
             exact List.Perm.cons_inv p

        | trans h1 h2 IH1 IH2 =>

intro i j e
          cases i using Fin.cases <;> cases j using Fin.cases
          · exact h
          · simp at e ⊢; subst x
            apply List.Perm.of_cons (a := l2[j])
            rw [List.eraseIdx_eq_take_drop_succ]

            exact List.Perm.middle.symm.trans (h.trans List.Perm.middle)
          · simp at e ⊢; subst x
            apply List.Perm.of_cons (a := l1[i])
            rw [List.eraseIdx_eq_take_drop_succ]
            nth_rw 1 [←List.take_append_drop i.1 l1]
            exact List.Perm.middle.symm.trans (List.Perm.middle.trans h)
          · simp at e ⊢; exact h.cons (IH e)
        | swap x y l =>
          intro i j e
          have h1 : (y :: x :: l).Perm ((y::x::l)[i] :: (y::x::l).eraseIdx i) := by
            rw [List.eraseIdx_eq_take_drop_succ]
            nth_rw 1 [←List.take_append_drop i.1 _]
            exact List.Perm.middle
          have h2 : (x :: y :: l).Perm ((x::y::l)[j] :: (x::y::l).eraseIdx j) := by
            rw [List.eraseIdx_eq_take_drop_succ]
            nth_rw 1 [←List.take_append_drop j.1 _]
            exact List.Perm.middle
          rw [e] at h1
          apply List.Perm.of_cons (a := (x::y::l)[j])
          exact h1.symm.trans ((List.Perm.swap x y l).trans h2)

           intro i k e

           exact (IH1 hj).trans (IH2 (by rw [←hj, e]))

          | ⟨0, _⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ => simp at heq; subst x; exact List.Perm.refl _
          | ⟨0, _⟩, ⟨1, _⟩ => exact List.Perm.refl _
          | ⟨1, _⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ => exact List.Perm.refl _
          | ⟨1, _⟩, ⟨1, _⟩ => simp at heq; subst x; exact List.Perm.refl _
          | ⟨i'+2, hi⟩, ⟨j'+2, hj⟩ =>

               · rw [List.eraseIdx_eq_take_drop_succ, ←List.take_append_drop_succ l j']

          exact (IH1 i j hj.symm).trans (IH2 j k (by rw [hj, heq]))

list_perm_in h1 _ (List.get_mem ..)
          obtain ⟨i2, h2⟩ := in_list_idx this
          apply List.Perm.trans (ih1 h2) (ih2 _)
          rw [←h2, heq]
idx2))

rename_i h ih
          intro idx1 idx2 heq
          have lem (l : List α) (i : Fin l.length) : l.Perm (l[i] :: l.eraseIdx i) := by
            induction l with
            | nil => exact i.elim0
            | cons x xs ih =>
              match i with
              | ⟨0, _⟩ => simp
              | ⟨k+1, hk⟩ =>
                simp; apply List.Perm.trans _ (List.Perm.swap ..)
                apply List.Perm.cons; exact ih ⟨k, Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ hk⟩
          apply List.Perm.cons_inv (x := l1[idx1])
          trans l1; exact (lem l1 idx1).symm
          trans l2; exact List.Perm.cons x h
          rw [←heq]; exact lem l2 idx2
        | swap x y l =>
          intro idx1 idx2 heq
          have lem (l : List α) (i : Fin l.length) : l.Perm (l[i] :: l.eraseIdx i) := by
            induction l with
            | nil => exact i.elim0
            | cons x xs ih =>
              match i with
              | ⟨0, _⟩ => simp
              | ⟨k+1, hk⟩ =>
                simp; apply List.Perm.trans _ (List.Perm.swap ..)
                apply List.Perm.cons; exact ih ⟨k, Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ hk⟩
          apply List.Perm.cons_inv (x := (y :: x :: l)[idx1])
          trans (y :: x :: l); exact (lem _ idx1).symm
          trans (x :: y :: l); apply List.Perm.swap
          rw [←heq]; exact lem _ idx2
        | trans l1 l2 l3 p1 p2 ih1 ih2 =>
          intro i k heq
          have : l1[i] ∈ l2 := list_perm_in p1 _ (List.get_mem l1 i)
          obtain ⟨j, hj⟩ := in_list_idx this
          apply List.Perm.trans (ih1 i j (Eq.symm hj))
          apply ih2 j k (Eq.trans hj heq)

intro i j h
          match i, j with
          | ⟨0, _⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ => exact l1
          | ⟨0, _⟩, ⟨j'+1, hj'⟩ =>
            simp at h; subst x
            simp [List.eraseIdx]
            exact l1.trans (List.perm_middle _ _ _).symm
          | ⟨i'+1, hi'⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ =>
            simp at h; subst x
            simp [List.eraseIdx]
            exact (List.perm_middle _ _ _).trans l1
          | ⟨i'+1, hi'⟩, ⟨j'+1, hj'⟩ =>
            exact l2 (by simpa using h)
        | swap x y l =>
          intro i j h
          have key (l : List α) (k : Fin l.length) : l.Perm (l[k] :: l.eraseIdx k) := by
            simp only [List.eraseIdx, List.get_eq_getElem]
            nth_rw 1 [List.take_append_drop_succ_eq_drop k.1]
            exact List.perm_middle _ _ _
          have : (y::x::l).Perm (x::y::l) := List.Perm.swap x y l
          have p := ((key _ i).symm.trans this).trans (key _ j)
          rw [h] at p
          exact List.Perm.cons_inv p
        | trans h1 h2 ih1 ih2 =>
          intro i k h
          have : List.get _ i ∈ _ := (List.Perm.mem_iff h1).mp (List.get_mem _ i i.2)
          obtain ⟨j, hj⟩ := in_list_idx this
          exact (ih1 hj).trans (ih2 (by rw [←hj, h]))

exact h
          | ⟨i+1, hi⟩, ⟨j+1, hj⟩ =>
            simp only [List.getElem_cons_succ] at H
            exact (IH H).cons x
          | ⟨0, _⟩, ⟨j+1, hj⟩ =>
            simp only [List.getElem_cons_zero, List.getElem_cons_succ] at H
            subst x
            have : l2.Perm (l2[j] :: l2.eraseIdx j) := by
              rw [List.eraseIdx_eq_take_drop_succ]
              trans (l2.take j ++ l2.drop (j+1)) ++ [l2[j]]
              · simp only [List.append_assoc, List.singleton_append]; exact List.perm_append_comm _ _
              · simp only [List.singleton_append]; apply List.Perm.cons; exact List.perm_append_comm _ _
            exact h.trans this
          | ⟨i+1, hi⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ =>
            simp only [List.getElem_cons_zero, List.getElem_cons_succ] at H
            subst x
            have : l1.Perm (l1[i] :: l1.eraseIdx i) := by
              rw [List.eraseIdx_eq_take_drop_succ]
              trans (l1.take i ++ l1.drop (i+1)) ++ [l1[i]]
              · simp only [List.append_assoc, List.singleton_append]; exact List.perm_append_comm _ _
              · simp only [List.singleton_append]; apply List.Perm.cons; exact List.perm_append_comm _ _
            exact this.symm.trans h
        | swap y x l =>
          intro i1 i2 H
          simp at H
          if h : i1.1 = 0 ∧ i2.1 = 0 then
             subst y; exact List.Perm.swap x x l
          else if h : i1.1 = 1 ∧ i2.1 = 1 then
             subst x; exact List.Perm.swap y y l
          else if h : i1.1 = 0 ∧ i2.1 = 1 then
             subst y; exact List.Perm.refl _
          else if h : i1.1 = 1 ∧ i2.1 = 0 then
             subst y; exact List.Perm.refl _
          else
             -- Use counting argument for the complex swap case if available, or fallback to structural
             try rw [List.perm_iff_count] at *
             try intro n
             try repeat rw [List.count_eraseIdx]
             try simp [List.perm_iff_count.mp (List.Perm.swap y x l) n, H]
             try split <;> split <;> try rfl
             try all_goals (simp at *; subst n; contradiction)
        | trans l1 l2 l3 h1 h2 IH1 IH2 =>
          intro i1 i3 H
          obtain ⟨i2, h2⟩ := List.mem_iff_get.mp (h1.subset (List.get_mem _ i1 i1.isLt))
          exact (IH1 h2).trans (IH2 (h2.symm.trans H))

rename_i hPerm IH
          intro idx1 idx2 h
          match idx1, idx2 with
          | ⟨0, _⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ => exact hPerm
          | ⟨0, _⟩, ⟨j + 1, hj⟩ =>
            simp only [List.getElem_cons_zero, List.getElem_cons_succ] at h
            subst x
            exact hPerm.trans (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ ⟨j, hj⟩).symm
          | ⟨i + 1, hi⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ =>
            simp only [List.getElem_cons_zero, List.getElem_cons_succ] at h
            subst x
            exact (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ ⟨i, hi⟩).trans hPerm
          | ⟨i + 1, hi⟩, ⟨j + 1, hj⟩ =>
            simp only [List.getElem_cons_succ] at h
            exact (IH h).cons x

intro idx1 idx3 heq
          have h_in : l1[idx1] ∈ l2 := list_perm_in p1 _ (List.getElem_mem _ _)
          obtain ⟨idx2, h2⟩ := in_list_idx h_in
          exact (IH1 h2.symm).trans (IH2 (h2.trans heq))

rename_i h ih
          intro i j h_eq
          match i, j with
          | ⟨0, _⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ => simpa using h
          | ⟨0, _⟩, ⟨k+1, hk⟩ =>
            simp at h_eq ⊢; rw [h_eq]
            exact h.trans (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ ⟨k, hk⟩)
          | ⟨k+1, hk⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ =>
            simp at h_eq ⊢; rw [←h_eq]
            exact (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ ⟨k, hk⟩).symm.trans h
          | ⟨i+1, hi⟩, ⟨j+1, hj⟩ =>
            simp at h_eq ⊢
            exact (ih h_eq).cons x
        | swap x y l =>
          intro i j h_eq
          match i, j with
          | ⟨0, _⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ => simp at h_eq; subst x; exact List.Perm.refl _
          | ⟨0, _⟩, ⟨1, _⟩ => exact List.Perm.refl _
          | ⟨1, _⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ => exact List.Perm.refl _
          | ⟨1, _⟩, ⟨1, _⟩ => simp at h_eq; subst x; exact List.Perm.refl _
          | ⟨0, _⟩, ⟨k+2, hk⟩ =>
            simp at h_eq
            exact List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ ⟨k, hk⟩
          | ⟨1, _⟩, ⟨k+2, hk⟩ =>
            simp at h_eq
            exact (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ ⟨k, hk⟩).cons y |>.trans (List.Perm.swap _ _ _)
          | ⟨k+2, hk⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ =>
            simp at h_eq
            exact (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ ⟨k, hk⟩).symm
          | ⟨k+2, hk⟩, ⟨1, _⟩ =>
            simp at h_eq
            exact (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ ⟨k, hk⟩).symm.cons x |>.trans (List.Perm.swap _ _ _)
          | ⟨k+2, hk⟩, ⟨m+2, hm⟩ =>
            simp at h_eq ⊢
            have p := (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx l ⟨k, hk⟩).symm.trans (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx l ⟨m, hm⟩)
            rw [h_eq] at p
            exact (List.Perm.cons_inv p).cons _ |>.cons _ |>.trans (List.Perm.swap _ _ _)
        | trans p1 p2 ih1 ih2 =>
          intro i k h
          obtain ⟨j, hj⟩ := List.mem_iff_get.mp (p1.subset (List.get_mem _ i i.is_lt))
          exact (ih1 hj).trans (ih2 (by rwa [hj]))

exact h
          | ⟨0, _⟩, ⟨j+1, hj⟩ =>
            simp only [Fin.val_zero, List.getElem_cons_zero, List.getElem_cons_succ] at heq
            subst x
            trans l1
            · exact h
            · rw [List.eraseIdx_eq_take_drop]
              conv_lhs => rw [←List.take_append_drop_succ l2 j]
              exact List.perm_middle.symm
          | ⟨i+1, hi⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ =>
            simp only [Fin.val_zero, List.getElem_cons_zero, List.getElem_cons_succ] at heq
            subst x
            trans l2
            · rw [List.eraseIdx_eq_take_drop]
              conv_lhs => rw [←List.take_append_drop_succ l1 i]
              exact List.perm_middle
            · exact h.symm
          | ⟨i+1, hi⟩, ⟨j+1, hj⟩ =>
            simp only [List.getElem_cons_succ] at heq
            apply List.Perm.cons
            apply ih heq
        | swap x y l =>
          intro idx1 idx2 heq
          have move_front (l : List α) (i : Fin l.length) : l.Perm (l[i] :: l.eraseIdx i) := by
             rw [List.eraseIdx_eq_take_drop]
             conv_lhs => rw [←List.take_append_drop_succ l i]
             exact List.perm_middle.symm
          match idx1, idx2 with
          | ⟨0, _⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ => exact List.Perm.swap x y l
          | ⟨1, _⟩, ⟨1, _⟩ => exact List.Perm.swap y x l
          | ⟨0, _⟩, ⟨1, _⟩ => simp at heq; subst x; exact List.Perm.refl _
          | ⟨1, _⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ => simp at heq; subst x; exact List.Perm.refl _
          | ⟨0, _⟩, ⟨j+2, hj⟩ =>
            simp at heq; subst y
            trans (x :: l)
            · exact List.Perm.refl _
            · trans (x :: l[j] :: l.eraseIdx j)
              · apply List.Perm.cons; apply move_front
              · apply List.Perm.swap
          | ⟨i+2, hi⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ =>
            simp at heq; subst x
            trans (y :: l)
            · trans (y :: l[i] :: l.eraseIdx i)
              · apply List.Perm.cons; apply (move_front _ _).symm
              · apply List.Perm.swap
            · exact List.Perm.refl _
          | ⟨1, _⟩, ⟨j+2, hj⟩ =>
             simp at heq; subst x
             trans (y :: l)
             · exact List.Perm.refl _
             · apply List.Perm.cons; apply (move_front _ _).symm
          | ⟨i+2, hi⟩, ⟨1, _⟩ =>
             simp at heq; subst y
             trans (x :: l)
             · apply List.Perm.cons; apply move_front
             · exact List.Perm.refl _
          | ⟨i+2, hi⟩, ⟨j+2, hj⟩ =>
             simp at heq
             apply List.Perm.trans (List.Perm.swap y x (l.eraseIdx i))
             apply List.Perm.cons
             apply List.Perm.cons
             trans (l[i] :: l.eraseIdx i)
             · apply (move_front _ _).symm
             · trans (l[j] :: l.eraseIdx j)
               · simp [heq]
               · apply move_front
        | trans h1 h2 ih1 ih2 =>
          intro idx1 idx3 heq
          obtain ⟨idx2, h2eq⟩ := in_list_idx (h1.subset (List.getElem_mem _ _))
          trans (l2.eraseIdx idx2)
          · apply ih1 h2eq.symm
          · apply ih2; rw [h2eq, heq]

exact (Fin.elim0 k)
            | cons y ys ih_l =>
              match k with
              | ⟨0, _⟩ => simp
              | ⟨k'+1, hk'⟩ =>
                simp only [List.getElem_cons_succ, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ]
                trans y :: ys[k'] :: ys.eraseIdx k'
                · apply List.Perm.cons; apply ih_l ⟨k', Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ hk'⟩
                · apply List.Perm.swap
          match idx1, idx2 with
          | ⟨0, _⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ =>
            simp; exact hp
          | ⟨0, _⟩, ⟨j+1, hj⟩ =>
            simp at heq ⊢; rw [heq]
            trans tl2
            · exact hp
            · exact lem tl2 ⟨j, Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ hj⟩
          | ⟨i+1, hi⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ =>
            simp at heq ⊢; rw [←heq]
            trans tl1
            · apply List.Perm.symm; exact lem tl1 ⟨i, Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ hi⟩
            · exact hp
          | ⟨i+1, hi⟩, ⟨j+1, hj⟩ =>
            simp at heq ⊢
            apply List.Perm.cons
            apply ih
            exact heq

exact h
            | succ j =>
              simp at heq; rw [heq]
              have : l2.Perm (l2[j] :: l2.eraseIdx j) := by
                induction l2 generalizing j with
                | nil => exact j.elim0
                | cons y ys ih =>
                  cases j using Fin.cases with
                  | zero => exact List.Perm.refl _
                  | succ j => simp; exact (List.Perm.cons y (ih j)).trans (List.Perm.swap y _ _)
              exact h.trans this
          | succ i =>
            cases idx2 using Fin.cases with
            | zero =>
              simp at heq; rw [←heq]
              have : l1.Perm (l1[i] :: l1.eraseIdx i) := by
                induction l1 generalizing i with
                | nil => exact i.elim0
                | cons y ys ih =>
                  cases i using Fin.cases with
                  | zero => exact List.Perm.refl _
                  | succ i => simp; exact (List.Perm.cons y (ih i)).trans (List.Perm.swap y _ _)
              exact this.symm.trans h
            | succ j =>
              simp at heq
              exact (ih heq).cons x
        | swap x y l =>
          intro idx1 idx2 heq
          have pe (l : List α) (i : Fin l.length) : l.Perm (l[i] :: l.eraseIdx i) := by
            induction l generalizing i with
            | nil => exact i.elim0
            | cons y ys ih =>
              cases i using Fin.cases with
              | zero => exact List.Perm.refl _
              | succ i => simp; exact (List.Perm.cons y (ih i)).trans (List.Perm.swap y _ _)
          apply List.Perm.cons_inv (a := (x :: y :: l)[idx1])
          rw [heq]
          exact (pe _ _).symm.trans <| (List.Perm.swap x y l).trans (pe _ _)
        | trans l1 l2 l3 h1 h2 ih1 ih2 =>
          intro idx1 idx3 heq
          have pe (l : List α) (i : Fin l.length) : l.Perm (l[i] :: l.eraseIdx i) := by
            induction l generalizing i with
            | nil => exact i.elim0
            | cons y ys ih =>
              cases i using Fin.cases with
              | zero => exact List.Perm.refl _
              | succ i => simp; exact (List.Perm.cons y (ih i)).trans (List.Perm.swap y _ _)
          apply List.Perm.cons_inv (a := l1[idx1])
          rw [heq]
          exact (pe _ _).symm.trans <| (h1.trans h2).trans (pe _ _)

intro idx1 idx2 heq
          match idx1, idx2 with
          | ⟨0, _⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ => exact l1
          | ⟨i+1, hi⟩, ⟨j+1, hj⟩ =>
            simp only [List.eraseIdx_cons_succ]
            exact l2 (by simpa using heq)
          | ⟨0, _⟩, ⟨j+1, hj⟩ =>
            simp only [List.getElem_cons_zero, List.getElem_cons_succ] at heq
            subst x
            simp only [List.eraseIdx_cons_zero, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ]
            exact l1.trans (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ ⟨j, Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ hj⟩)
          | ⟨i+1, hi⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ =>
            simp only [List.getElem_cons_zero, List.getElem_cons_succ] at heq
            subst x
            simp only [List.eraseIdx_cons_zero, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ]
            exact (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ ⟨i, Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ hi⟩).symm.trans l1
idx2

exact hPerm
          | ⟨0, _⟩, ⟨j+1, hj⟩ =>
            simp at heq; subst x; trans l2
            · exact hPerm
            · exact perm_cons (i := ⟨j, hj⟩)
          | ⟨i+1, hi⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ =>
            simp at heq; subst x; trans l1
            · apply List.Perm.symm; exact perm_cons (i := ⟨i, hi⟩)
            · exact hPerm
          | ⟨i+1, hi⟩, ⟨j+1, hj⟩ =>
            simp at heq; apply List.Perm.cons; apply ih; exact heq
        | swap x y l =>
           intro idx1 idx2 heq
           match idx1, idx2 with
           | ⟨0,_⟩, ⟨0,_⟩ => simp at heq; subst x; exact List.Perm.refl _
           | ⟨0,_⟩, ⟨1,_⟩ => simp; exact List.Perm.refl _
           | ⟨1,_⟩, ⟨0,_⟩ => simp; exact List.Perm.refl _
           | ⟨1,_⟩, ⟨1,_⟩ => simp at heq; subst x; exact List.Perm.refl _
           | ⟨0,_⟩, ⟨k+2, hk⟩ =>
             simp at heq; subst y; apply List.Perm.cons
             exact perm_cons (i := ⟨k, by simpa using hk⟩)
           | ⟨k+2, hk⟩, ⟨0,_⟩ =>
             simp at heq; subst y; apply List.Perm.symm; apply List.Perm.cons
             exact perm_cons (i := ⟨k, by simpa using hk⟩)
           | ⟨1,_⟩, ⟨k+2, hk⟩ =>
             simp at heq; subst x; apply List.Perm.cons
             exact perm_cons (i := ⟨k, by simpa using hk⟩)
           | ⟨k+2, hk⟩, ⟨1,_⟩ =>
             simp at heq; subst x; apply List.Perm.symm; apply List.Perm.cons
             exact perm_cons (i := ⟨k, by simpa using hk⟩)
           | ⟨i+2, hi⟩, ⟨k+2, hk⟩ =>
             simp at heq; trans x :: y :: l.eraseIdx i
             · apply List.Perm.swap
             · apply List.Perm.cons; apply List.Perm.cons
               apply perm_refl (i := ⟨i, by simpa using hi⟩) (j := ⟨k, by simpa using hk⟩)
               exact heq
        | trans l1 l2 l3 h1 h2 ih1 ih2 =>
           intro idx1 idx3 heq
           obtain ⟨idx2, hidx2⟩ := in_list_idx (show l1[idx1] ∈ l2 from (List.Perm.mem_iff h1).mp (List.getElem_mem _ _))
           trans l2.eraseIdx idx2
           · apply ih1; rw [hidx2]
           · apply ih2; rw [hidx2, heq]

intro idx1 idx2 h
          match idx1, idx2 with
          | ⟨0, _⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ => exact l1
          | ⟨0, _⟩, ⟨i+1, hi⟩ =>
            simp at h ⊢; subst x
            exact l1.trans (List.perm_eraseIdx _ ⟨i, hi⟩)
          | ⟨i+1, hi⟩, ⟨0, _⟩ =>
            simp at h ⊢; subst x
            exact (List.perm_eraseIdx _ ⟨i, hi⟩).symm.trans l1
          | ⟨i+1, hi⟩, ⟨j+1, hj⟩ =>
            simp at h ⊢
            exact (l2 h).cons x
        | swap y x l =>
          intro idx1 idx2 h
          have p_swap : (y :: x :: l) ~ (x :: y :: l) := List.Perm.swap y x l
          have p1 : (y :: x :: l) ~ (y :: x :: l)[idx1] :: (y :: x :: l).eraseIdx idx1 :=
            List.perm_eraseIdx _ _
          have p2 : (x :: y :: l) ~ (x :: y :: l)[idx2] :: (x :: y :: l).eraseIdx idx2 :=
            List.perm_eraseIdx _ _
          rw [h] at p1
          exact List.Perm.cons_inv <| p1.symm.trans <| p_swap.trans p2
        | trans p1 p2 IH1 IH2 =>
          intro idx1 idx3 h
          have h_in : l1[idx1] ∈ l2 := list_perm_in p1 (List.getElem_mem _ _)
          obtain ⟨idx2, h2⟩ := in_list_idx h_in
          have h' : l2[idx2] = l3[idx3] := by rw [h2, h]
          exact (IH1 (Eq.symm h2)).trans (IH2 h')

let p := l1
          let IH := l2
          intro i j h
          cases i using Fin.cases <;> cases j using Fin.cases
          · simp at h ⊢; exact p
          · simp at h ⊢; subst x
            exact p.trans (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ _).symm
          · simp at h ⊢; subst x
            exact (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ _).trans p
          · simp at h ⊢; exact (IH h).cons x
        | swap x y l =>
          intro i j h
          simp only [List.length_cons] at i j
          cases i using Fin.cases <;> cases j using Fin.cases
          · simp at h ⊢; subst x; apply List.Perm.swap
          · rename_i j; cases j using Fin.cases
            · simp at h ⊢; apply List.Perm.refl
            · simp at h ⊢; subst y
              exact (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ _).symm.cons _
          · rename_i i; cases i using Fin.cases
            · simp at h ⊢; apply List.Perm.refl
            · simp at h ⊢; subst x
              exact (List.Perm.swap _ _ _).trans ((List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ _).symm.cons _)
          · rename_i i j; cases i using Fin.cases <;> cases j using Fin.cases
            · simp at h ⊢; subst x
              exact (List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ _).symm.cons _
            · simp at h ⊢; subst y
              exact (List.Perm.swap _ _ _).trans ((List.perm_cons_eraseIdx _ _).symm.cons _)
            · simp at h ⊢
              apply List.Perm.swap
        | trans p1 p2 IH1 IH2 =>
          intro i k h
          have := p1.mem_iff.mp (List.mem_iff_get.mpr ⟨i, rfl⟩)
          obtain ⟨j, hj⟩ := List.mem_iff_get.mp this
          exact (IH1 _ _ hj).trans (IH2 _ _ (by rw [←hj, h]))

intro idx1 idx2 h
           obtain ⟨idx', h'⟩ := in_list_idx (list_perm_in p1 (List.get_mem _ idx1.1 idx1.2))
           exact (IH1 h'.symm).trans (IH2 (h'.trans h))
idx2

rw [←h] at p2
        exact p1.symm.trans (hPerm.trans p2)
idx2))

intro idx1 idx2 h
          have : l1[idx1] ∈ p1.2 := by
            apply list_perm_in p1
            exact List.getElem_mem _ _ _
          obtain ⟨idx_mid, h_mid⟩ := in_list_idx this
          apply List.Perm.trans (ih1 h_mid.symm)
          apply ih2 (Eq.trans h_mid h)
